title.en: Health software and health IT systems safety, effectiveness and security - Part 5-1: Security - Activities in the product life cycle
title.zh: 健康软件和健康IT系统的安全性、有效性和网络安全 - 第5-1部分：安全 - 产品生命周期中的活动

standards.abstract: Defines lifecycle requirements for development and maintenance of health software needed to support conformance to IEC 62443-4-1, taking specific needs for health software into account. Considered current state-of-the-art for medical device cybersecurity under EU MDR.
standards.scope: Secure software lifecycle processes for health software and medical device software (SaMD, SiMD, MDSW).
standards.note: EN IEC 81001-5-1:2022 published. Harmonisation under EU MDR delayed to 2028. Already mandatory in Japan (JIS T 81001-5-1) since April 2024. FDA recognized consensus standard.

title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 4-5: Guidance and interpretation - Safety-related technical security specifications
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第4-5部分：指南和解释 - 安全相关技术安全规范

standards.abstract: Defines Security Levels (SL 0-4) and Security Capabilities (SC) for medical devices with network connectivity. Complements IEC 81001-5-1 by specifying technical security requirements.
standards.scope: Technical security requirements for network-connected medical electrical equipment.

title.en: Application of risk management for IT-networks incorporating medical devices - Part 1: Safety, effectiveness and security in the implementation and use of connected medical devices or connected health software
title.zh: IT网络中纳入医疗器械的风险管理应用 - 第1部分：联网医疗器械或联网健康软件的实施和使用中的安全性、有效性和网络安全

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for risk management when medical devices or health software are incorporated into IT-networks.
standards.scope: Risk management for networked medical devices and health IT.

title.en: Security for industrial automation and control systems - Part 4-1: Secure product development lifecycle requirements
title.zh: 工业自动化和控制系统安全 - 第4-1部分：安全产品开发生命周期要求

standards.abstract: Defines secure product development lifecycle requirements. IEC 81001-5-1 adapts this standard specifically for health software.
standards.scope: Secure development lifecycle requirements for products used in industrial automation, also applicable to medical devices.

title.en: Principles for medical device security - Risk management
title.zh: 医疗器械安全原则 - 风险管理

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on applying ISO 14971 risk management process to cybersecurity threats for medical devices. FDA recognized consensus standard.
standards.scope: Cybersecurity risk management principles for medical devices.

title.en: Application of risk management for IT-networks incorporating medical devices - Part 2-2: Guidance for the communication of medical device security needs, risks and controls
title.zh: IT网络中纳入医疗器械的风险管理应用 - 第2-2部分：医疗器械安全需求、风险和控制的沟通指南

standards.abstract: Defines a framework for manufacturer disclosure of medical device security capabilities (MDS2 form). Withdrawn and replaced by IEC TS 81001-2-2:2025.
standards.scope: Communication framework for medical device security properties and manufacturer disclosure statements.

title.en: Health software and health IT systems safety, effectiveness and security - Part 2-2: Coordination - Guidance for the implementation, disclosure and communication of security needs, risks and controls
title.zh: 健康软件和健康IT系统的安全性、有效性和网络安全 - 第2-2部分：协调 - 安全需求、风险和控制的实施、披露和沟通指南

standards.abstract: Combines and updates IEC/TR 80001-2-2:2012 and IEC TR 80001-2-8:2016. Provides guidance on implementation, disclosure and communication of security needs, risks and controls for connected medical devices and health software.
standards.scope: Security coordination and disclosure framework for health software and IT systems incorporating medical devices.
